  +--------------+
  |  Exit Point  |
  +--------------+
          ^---------+
+-------------------+-+
|  [  Core Logic  ]   |
|         |           |
|  +------+------+    |
|  |  Process B  |    |
|  +-------------+    |
|         ^           |
|         |           |
|  +------+------+    |
|  |  Process A  |    |
|  +-------------+    |
+---------^-----------+
          |
          |
          |
  +-------+-------+
  |  Entry Point  |
  +---------------+
